parameters.query:
WITH price_data AS (
  SELECT
    p.commodity_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_source_id',  tt.source_id,
        'terminal_name',       tt.name,
        'terminal_type',       tt.terminal_type,
        'terminal_code',       tt.metadata->>'code',
        'terminal_screenshot', tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live',   (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
        'location_name',       COALESCE(l.name, tt.metadata->>'outpost_name', tt.metadata->>'planet_name'),
        'location_type',       COALESCE(l.location_type, tt.metadata->>'type'),
        'system_name',         COALESCE(s.name, tt.metadata->>'star_system_name'),
        'system_code',         COALESCE(s.metadata->>'code', ''),
        'buy_price',           p.buy_price,
        'sell_price',          p.sell_price
      ) ORDER BY COALESCE(s.name, tt.metadata->>'star_system_name'),
                 COALESCE(l.name, tt.metadata->>'outpost_name'),
                 tt.name
    ) FILTER (WHERE p.id IS NOT NULL) AS sold_at
  FROM prices p
  LEFT JOIN trade_terminals tt ON tt.source_id = concat('terminals:', p.uex_terminal_id::text)
  LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = tt.location_id
  LEFT JOIN systems s ON s.id = l.system_id
  WHERE p.asset_type = 'commodity'
  GROUP BY p.commodity_id
),
datap4k_data AS (
  SELECT
    el.source_id AS commodity_source_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'slug',                mn.slug,
        'rarity',              mn.rarity,
        'mining_type',         mn.mining_type,
        'resistance',          mn.resistance,
        'instability',         mn.instability,
        'explosion',           mn.explosion,
        'optimal_window_mid',  mn.optimal_window_mid,
        'optimal_window_thin', mn.optimal_window_thin,
        'locations',           mn.locations,
        'rock_type',           mn.rock_type
      ) ORDER BY mn.mining_type
    ) AS mining_data
  FROM datap4k_mining_norm mn
  JOIN datap4k_entity_links el ON el.id = mn.entity_link_id
  WHERE mn.section = 'elements'
    AND el.entity_type = 'commodity'
  GROUP BY el.source_id
),
crafting_data AS (
  SELECT
    mineral_name,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'slug',        slug,
        'name',        name,
        'entity_type', 'weapon',
        'category',    category
      ) ORDER BY name
    ) AS used_in_crafting
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      ck.mineral_name,
      w.slug,
      w.name,
      w.category
    FROM entity_display w,
      jsonb_array_elements(w.payload->'crafting') cr,
      jsonb_object_keys(cr->'totals') AS ck(mineral_name)
    WHERE w.entity_type = 'weapon'
      AND jsonb_array_length(w.payload->'crafting') > 0
  ) deduped
  GROUP BY mineral_name
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  c.slug,
  'commodity',
  c.name,
  NULL,
  c.metadata->>'kind',
  (c.metadata->>'id')::integer,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',      c.name,
    'code',      c.code,
    'kind',      c.metadata->>'kind',
    'wiki',      c.metadata->>'wiki',
    'is_raw',    (c.metadata->>'is_raw')::boolean,
    'is_fuel',   (c.metadata->>'is_fuel')::boolean,
    'is_pure',   (c.metadata->>'is_pure')::boolean,
    'is_inert',  (c.metadata->>'is_inert')::boolean,
    'source_id', c.source_id,
    'metadata',  c.metadata,
    'sold_at',            COALESCE(pd.sold_at, '[]'::jsonb),
    'datap4k_mining',     COALESCE(dd.mining_data, '[]'::jsonb),
    'used_in_crafting',   COALESCE(cd.used_in_crafting, '[]'::jsonb),
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(c.name, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(c.code, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(c.metadata->>'kind', '')
  ),
  now()
FROM commodities c
LEFT JOIN price_data pd ON pd.commodity_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN datap4k_data dd ON dd.commodity_source_id = c.source_id
LEFT JOIN crafting_data cd ON cd.mineral_name = c.name
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc ON esc.entity_type = 'commodity' AND esc.uex_slug = c.slug
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
